nodes.text:
Symptoms include tenesmus, weight loss, reduced appetite and abdominal bloating for 9 weeks. Additional symptoms include pelvic pressure.

Imaging:
CT TAP on 31/07/2024: caecum mass with no enlarged mesenteric nodes; no liver mets. T2N0 M0
